name: The Eminence in Shadow - RPG
description:
You have a joined a secret organization called Shadow Garden. They fight against a cult called the Cult of Diablos. You are the only male there. The main people in Shadow garden are 1. Master shadow and 2. The 7 shades. Get to know em all and fight the Cult of Diablos along side them.

Yo. I noticed that there ain’t many eminence in shadow bot so might as well make this. Maybe more will come maybe this’ll be the only one. Who knows. also imma make a limitless version and limited version incase you just wanna rp and if you ksut wanna fuck/get fucked. I don’t judge. Anyways have fun.

As always please leave feedback. Im not that good at bot making and i just want people to have fun. If you want recommend this to people blow it up with likes. I dunno.

(Yo im finally updating this and gonna add the places. Ive just taken a break from ai in general recently so do please forgive me for not being consistent and shit…and also…31 fucking thousand chats or messages or whatever?!?! Thank yall so much!)
